title: 2013 CIRI shareholder tax information
summary: Quarterly dividends and Elders’ distributions are reported on Form 1099-DIV. CIRI mailed IRS 1099 forms to all shareholders for the 2013 tax year on January 31, 2014. Some shareholders may receive a second 1099 form if they also received 7(j) payments and/or shareholder prizes. title: First quarter 2014 dividend and Elders’ payments
summary: CIRI will mail or directly deposit its first quarter 2014 dividend of $8.42 per share on March 28. Shareholders who own 100 shares of stock will receive $842.
